mission.title: Dhamira Yetu
mission.content: Kuendeleza utawala wa usalama wa mtandao na tele-informatics kote Afrika kupitia utafiti, uchambuzi wa sera, ujenzi wa uwezo, na ushirikiano wa kikanda.

repository.title: Policy Creation
repository.description: Supporting the development and curation of policy documents, legislation, and implementation guidance to assist governments and institutions.

vision.title: Dira Yetu
vision.content: Afrika salama na imara kidijitali ambapo mifumo ya utawala madhubuti huwezesha mabadiliko ya kidijitali salama na jumuishi.

partners.title: Washirika Wetu
partners.subtitle: Kufanya kazi pamoja kuimarisha utawala wa usalama wa mtandao kote Afrika
